title: Bit Digital Inc (BTBT) Q3 2024 Earnings Highlights
text: Total Revenue: $22.7 million, representing a 96% year-over-year increase, primarily driven by their HPC services business. Gross Profit: $7.2 million with an 800 basis point margin expansion to 32%. Bitcoin Production: Declined 59% to 165.4 BTC due to challenging mining conditions. Ethereum Staking: Generated 161.9 ETH worth approximately $450,000. The company faced a challenging third quarter for mining operations due to elevated electricity costs and reduced margins. Additionally, they received a termination notice from Coinmint affecting hosting contracts. Enovum Acquisition: Vertically integrated a high-performance computing data center operator, adding a new revenue stream worth approximately $7 million annually. GPU Expansion: Executed a Master Service Agreement with Boosteroid to deploy around 10,000 GPUs throughout 2025. Capacity Growth: Targeting 32 megawatts by year-end with 8 megawatts expected by Q2 2025. Financial Position: Cash and restricted cash: $106 million. Digital assets: $118 million. Total assets: $376 million. Shareholders' equity: $315 million.
